articles.title: Remembering affect between moments: assessing peak-end effects in continuous affect measures.
articles.authors: Leonie Cloos, Wolf Vanpaemel, Eva Ceulemans, Peter Kuppens
articles.abstract: In experience sampling (ESM) studies, participants are measured repeatedly to track momentary affect changes. The data is collected in specific time intervals, leaving gaps between assessments. To capture affective changes between assessments, we developed a measure where participants retrospectively draw their affect in a continuous drawing. This approach, while more complete, may be influenced by retrospective biases, such as the peak-end effect, where intense or recent moments are remembered disproportionately. In an ESM study, 115 participants rated their momentary positive and negative affect six times daily, drew affect changes between assessments, reported events, and completed one daily measurement burst with up to six momentary ratings. We examined the divergence of the retrospective continuous affect drawings from the momentary affect and event ratings, respectively. For positive affect, intensity and recency were associated with lower divergence; the association was nonlinear. Divergence was greatest at low intensity and reduced at moderate to high levels. For negative affect, intensity was associated with higher divergence and recency with lower divergence. The effect of intensity diminished over time, indicating that divergence is mostly determined by recency. Findings were similar for events, except that for negative events, there was no recency effect. Future research should consider the effect of time and intensity, especially the differential effect of positive and negative intensity, on short retrospective ESM measures.
articles.keywords: Experience sampling; affect dynamics; continuous affect; peak-end rule; retrospective self-report
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了体验采样研究中回顾性连续情感测量的峰值-结尾效应。通过让115名参与者每日多次评估情感并绘制变化图，分析了绘画与实时情感和事件报告的分歧。发现积极情感的分歧受强度和近期性影响呈非线性关系，而消极情感的分歧主要由近期性决定。强度效应随时间减弱，表明近期性在分歧中起主导作用。这些发现强调了在短期回顾性情感测量中考虑时间和强度因素的重要性。

articles.title: Fluency as a Cue to Authenticity.
articles.authors: Lydia Needy, Matthew Baldwin, Rebecca J Schlegel, Wilhelm Hofmann
articles.abstract: The quest for authenticity is a potent existential striving. Commonly defined as knowing and living in accordance with one's perceived "true self," we propose that authenticity may also be inferred from ambient feelings of fluency, or the subjective feeling of ease that corresponds to one's immediate experience, mental processing, or physical action. We report four studies (N = 1,465) supporting this idea. Study 1 shows that fluency during a recent activity predicts subjective authenticity beyond other relevant variables. Study 2 demonstrates that participants' recalled fluent experiences also felt authentic. In Study 3, generating self-defining attributes under cognitive load reduced fluency and, subsequently, subjective authenticity. Finally, preregistered Study 4 manipulated fluency during a non-self-relevant task. Participants in the fluent condition reported greater subjective authenticity than those in the disfluent condition. We discuss how a phenomenological approach to subjective authenticity can integrate and complement recent theorizing about the nature of authenticity.
articles.keywords: authenticity; fluency; phenomenology; self-concept; true self
articles.summary: 本研究探讨真实性感知与流畅性感觉的关系，提出流畅性作为主观体验中的轻松感可以推断真实性。通过四项实验研究，包括回忆、认知负荷和操作流畅性，共涉及1465名参与者。结果发现，活动流畅性预测主观真实性，流畅经验感觉更真实，而降低流畅性会减少真实性感知。这支持现象学方法对理解真实性的贡献。

articles.title: Attentional bias to situational and implicational information and individual differences in anxiety reactivity and perseveration.
articles.authors: Moore Sophia, Dondzilo Laura, Mazidi Mahdi, Macleod Colin, Notebaert Lies
articles.abstract: There are notable individual differences in how people manage the lead up to, and aftermath of, stressful events. Trait anxiety has consistently been identified as a key factor contributing to these differences. There is growing consensus that trait anxiety is multidimensional, comprising two distinct dimensions, anxiety reactivity and anxiety perseveration. Yet the cognitive mechanisms driving individual differences in these dimensions remain unclear. The present study investigated the potential role of attentional bias towards information differing in content (situational vs. implicational) and valence (negative vs. positive) in driving these individual differences. Undergraduate university students (N = 93) completed a dual-probe assessment task which presented video clips varying in content and valence. State anxiety was assessed at crucial junctures throughout the experimental session to index anxiety reactivity and perseveration. Results revealed attentional bias for negative implicational information played a significant role in predicting anxiety perseveration. Conversely, attention bias for negative situational information was not a significant predictor of anxiety reactivity. Findings are discussed with reference to limitations and future extensions that could build on these findings to address causality and develop interventions capable of modifying cognitive biases.
articles.keywords: Anxiety; attention; cognitive processes; perseveration; reactivity
articles.summary: 研究背景：个体在应对压力事件时存在情绪管理差异，特质焦虑是关键影响因素，但其认知机制尚不明确。方法：实验对93名大学生使用双探测评估任务，呈现不同内容和效价的视频片段，并在关键时刻测量状态焦虑，以评估焦虑反应性和持续性。主要发现：对负面含义信息的注意力偏向显著预测焦虑持续性，而对负面情境信息的偏向则不能预测焦虑反应性。研究讨论了结果的局限性和未来可能基于认知偏差的干预方向。

articles.title: The unique effect of the number of children on mothers' acceptance of children's negative emotions.
articles.authors: Jackie A Nelson, Carlos Carona, Helena Moreira, Ana Fonseca
articles.abstract: Although parenting research typically focuses on one target child, parents' emotion-related parenting behaviours are predicted by the broader family context. The number of children in the home impacts parents' emotional resources and may be particularly relevant to mothers' beliefs about acceptable emotional displays from their young children. Participants included 226 Portuguese mothers of a 2- to 6-year-old target child (M = 3.89 years) with between 1 and 4 children. Mothers reported on their family makeup, tolerance of their child's dominant and submissive negative emotion displays, parenting stress and mindful parenting. Covarying maternal age, family income and target child age, regressions revealed that mothers with more children were less likely to endorse beliefs that it was acceptable for their young child to display dominant negative emotions. Mothers were also more tolerant of displays of dominant negative emotions for younger children than older children within this early childhood period. These effects remained even after accounting for mothers' parenting stress and mindfulness. Results are interpreted using social information processing, emotion socialisation and transactional stress and coping perspectives.
articles.keywords: Emotion beliefs; early childhood; family size; mothers; parenting stress
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了家庭中孩子数量对母亲接受儿童负面情绪的影响，指出育儿研究通常关注单一儿童，但家庭背景可能调节母亲的情绪相关养育行为。研究样本为226位葡萄牙母亲，其目标儿童年龄在2至6岁之间，母亲报告了家庭构成、对孩子情绪展示的容忍度、养育压力和正念养育等信息。回归分析发现，孩子数量越多的母亲越不认为幼儿展示主导负面情绪是可接受的，且母亲对较年幼儿童的负面情绪展示比对年长儿童更宽容。这些效应在控制养育压力和正念后依然显著，研究结果支持社会信息处理和情绪社会化理论。

articles.title: Age-related neural dynamics of empathy in preschoolers: An EEG study with naturalistic viewing.
articles.authors: Ruoxi Wu, Yiming Zhang, Feiyu Quan, Yan Liang, Han Zhang, Chenbo Wang
articles.abstract: Empathy development in early childhood involves complex neurocognitive processes, but the neural mechanisms underlying this development have yet to be fully explored. This study combined EEG microstate and spectral analyses to investigate empathy-related neural processes in 71 typically developing preschoolers (aged 3-6 years) during naturalistic viewing of socioemotional animations. Spectral analysis revealed increased occipital theta, centrotemporal alpha and temporal beta activities during empathy-eliciting clips compared to baseline. Theta activity in response to Theory of Mind (ToM) clips negatively correlated with children's negative emotion understanding, while alpha activity during Emotional Contagion (EC) clips positively correlated with positive emotion resonance. Age-related decreases in occipital theta power and increases in centrotemporal alpha power were observed, paralleling behavioral improvements in prosocial helping behavior. Microstate analysis identified hierarchical age-related shifts: reduced coverage of microstate MS5 and increased transitions from MS5 to MS2 during ToM processing, implying that as children mature, perspective-taking efficiency increases, redirecting neural resources to response preparation. These findings suggest an age-related neural cascade framework where perceptual efficiency gains may free cognitive resources for mentalizing and emotion regulation, enabling more advanced prosocial actions. The present work suggests that EEG spectral and microstate metrics serve as sensitive neurophysiological indices for assessing early childhood age-related changes in empathy within naturalistic contexts.
articles.keywords: EEG microstates; Empathy; Neural oscillations; child development
articles.summary: 本研究旨在探索学龄前儿童同理心发展的神经机制，这一过程涉及复杂的认知和情绪过程。通过对71名3-6岁典型发育儿童进行EEG记录，结合微状态和频谱分析，研究他们在观看社会情感动画时的神经活动。频谱分析显示，与同理心相关的片段中枕叶θ波、中心颞叶α波和颞叶β波活动增强，其中θ波活动与儿童的负性情绪理解负相关，α波活动与正性情绪共鸣正相关。年龄增长伴随枕叶θ波功率下降和中心颞叶α波功率上升，这与亲社会帮助行为的行为改善平行。微状态分析发现年龄相关的层级转变，如MS5覆盖减少和向MS2转变增加，表明儿童成熟时透视效率提高，神经资源重新定向到反应准备，支持了年龄相关神经级联框架。

articles.title: A computational model of reward learning and habits on social media.
articles.authors: Georgia Turner, Lukas J Gunschera, Shashanka Subrahmanya, Aadesh Salecha, Johannes C Eichstaedt, Stefano Palminteri, Amy Orben
articles.abstract: Social media have fundamentally transformed how we live and communicate. However, the methods to study how our cognitive systems interact with technology platforms are very limited. Computational modelling represents a new avenue to uncover the finegrained cognitive processes driving social media behaviour. Here, we develop a computational model of real-world social media posting data, adapted from the animal reward learning literature. Using a Twitter (currently X) dataset (n = 2696 users), including a preregistered replication, we show that a hybrid reinforcement learning and habitual cognitive process underlies social media posting behaviour. More frequent posters show more signs of habitual behaviour. Further, younger people and women are more driven by reinforcement learning - updating their strategy more adaptively to maximise social media rewards - while older users and men are more habitual.
articles.keywords: Social media; Psychology; Computer science; Social learning; Artificial intelligence; Knowledge management; World Wide Web
articles.summary: 社交媒体行为研究的认知方法有限，本研究通过计算模型揭示其背后机制。基于动物奖赏学习理论，作者分析了Twitter数据集（n=2696用户），并通过预注册复制验证。结果显示，社交媒体发布行为由强化学习和习惯性认知过程共同驱动，频繁发布者更倾向习惯化。此外，年轻人和女性更依赖强化学习进行适应性调整，而年长用户和男性更依赖习惯。

articles.title: A synaptic mechanism for encoding the learned value of action-derived safety.
articles.authors: Emma E Macdonald, Jun Ma, Di Liu, Kai Yu, Rachel A Walker, Michael E Authement, Yan Leng, Hannah C Goldbach, Guochuan Li, Yulong Li, Veronica A Alvarez, Bruno B Averbeck, Mario A Penzo
articles.abstract: Adaptive behavior requires that behaviorally relevant signals gain access to neural circuits guiding action. The thalamus has long been proposed to regulate information flow to cortical and subcortical systems, yet whether it also tracks internally generated goal signals remains unclear. Here, we show that neurons in the paraventricular thalamus (PVT) projecting to the nucleus accumbens (NAc) encode the motivational value of safety during active avoidance. As mice learn to avoid threat, PVT→NAc neurons develop a signal that emerges selectively at successful avoidance, is experience-dependent, and diminishes following outcome devaluation. Selective silencing of the PVT→NAc pathway at safety onset reduces the motivational value assigned to safety without impairing action-outcome learning. Mechanistically, PVT input engages cholinergic interneurons (CIN) in the NAc to regulate dopamine release via synaptic potentiation mediated by GluA2-lacking AMPA receptors at PVT-CIN synapses. Disrupting this plasticity reduces the motivational impact of safety. These findings identify a thalamostriatal mechanism through which learned goals gain stable access to motivational circuitry.
articles.keywords: Neuroscience; Psychology; Nucleus accumbens; Mechanism (biology); Cognitive psychology; Dopamine; Philosophy; Epistemology
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了丘脑室旁核到伏隔核通路在编码行为学习获得的安全动机值中的作用。采用小鼠模型，通过避免威胁的行为训练、选择性沉默神经通路和电生理记录等方法。发现PVT→NAc神经元在成功避免威胁时发展出信号，该信号经验依赖并随结果贬值而减弱；破坏该通路减少安全动机值但不影响动作-结果学习。机制上涉及CIN调节多巴胺释放，依赖于突触可塑性，揭示了丘脑-纹状体通路在稳定接入动机回路中的功能。

articles.title: Neural Response to Familiar Names Predicts Outcome of Comatose ICU Patients: A Prospective Observational Cohort Study.
articles.authors: Min Wu, Yujia Di, Sheng Kuang, Jun Hu, Jie Zhang, Kang Wang, Jingchen Zhang, Chunyou Chen, Jiajia Zhou, Tong Li, Benyan Luo, Nai Ding
articles.abstract: Predicting the outcome of comatose patients in the intensive care unit (ICU) can inform decision making but remains challenging. Recent studies suggest that task-state electroencephalography (EEG) can detect covert cognition and facilitate patient prognosis. This study aimed to predict the outcome of comatose patients, by assessing covert processing of familiar names using a state-of-the-art EEG frequency tagging approach. Eighty-nine comatose patients following acute brain injury were recruited from five ICUs. Patients were presented with a rapid stream of familiar names and acoustically matched but unintelligible control sounds. EEG responses tracking the familiar names and control sounds were extracted in the frequency domain and utilised to predict the outcome of each patient, which was assessed at 1, 3, and 6 months post-injury using the Glasgow Outcome Scale-Extended (GOSE). Name-tracking EEG responses positively correlated with GOSE scores. A machine learning model integrating EEG responses and clinical characteristics achieved AUCs of 0.86, 0.88, and 0.86 in the test set, and 0.91, 0.90, and 0.85 in the external validation set, for predicting outcomes at 1, 3, and 6 months, respectively. These findings underscore that EEG assessment of residual processing of familiar names relates to patient outcomes and has the potential to predict outcome of comatose ICU patients.
articles.keywords: Medicine; Observational study; Outcome (game theory); Cohort study; Prospective cohort study; Emergency medicine; Intensive care medicine; MEDLINE; Cohort; Retrospective cohort study
articles.summary: 该研究旨在预测重症监护室昏迷患者的结局，背景是这一预测对临床决策至关重要但具有挑战性。研究采用先进的EEG频率标记方法，对89名急性脑损伤后的昏迷患者进行熟悉名字和匹配控制声音的刺激，提取神经响应并结合临床特征。机器学习模型整合EEG响应和临床数据，在测试集和外部验证集上实现了高AUC值，能准确预测患者在1、3和6个月后的结局。这些发现表明，EEG评估对熟悉名字的残留处理与患者结局相关，具有潜在预测价值。

articles.title: Just Like My CEO: When Perceived Similarity Makes Pay Inequality Acceptable.
articles.authors: Daniel Heller, Garrett L Brady, M Ena Inesi, Thomas Mussweiler
articles.abstract: Large CEO-employee pay gaps often elicit negative reactions, yet they have reached historic highs with limited resistance. How can this be explained? Developing a novel social comparison perspective, we propose that under specific circumstances pay inequality may yield positive reactions. We argue that perceived similarity with a CEO enhances acceptance of CEO pay, a process driven by elevated inspiration. We tested this prediction in four studies: a large international archival survey, a pre-registered survey of U.S. employees, and two pre-registered experiments. In the archival survey, we demonstrate that perceived similarity to CEOs, when measured indirectly, reduced support for income-inequality-reduction policies, and this effect appears-to-emerge across cultures. Converging experimental evidence reveals that employees who perceived greater similarity to their CEOs are more accepting of high CEO pay, due to feeling more inspired. These findings help elucidate why extreme pay disparities are often accepted, even though they may reinforce broader societal inequality.
articles.keywords: CEO; inspiration; leadership; local pay inequality; social comparison
articles.summary: 本研究探讨CEO与员工薪酬差距巨大却接受度高的现象，提出感知相似性通过提升灵感来增强对薪酬不平等的接受度。通过四项研究，包括国际档案调查、美国员工预注册调查和两个预注册实验，验证了假设。结果显示，感知与CEO的相似性降低了对收入不平等减少政策的支持，并因灵感增加而使员工更接受高CEO薪酬，且该效应跨文化存在。

articles.title: Sign language narrative reveals universal and modality-specific features of cortical timescale hierarchy.
articles.authors: Maria Zimmermann, Piotr Tomaszewski, Artur Marchewka, Marcin Szwed, Marina Bedny
articles.abstract: Human languages are unique in their capacity to tell stories. Prior neuroimaging studies show that spoken language narrative comprehension engages a neural time-scale hierarchy, from words and sentences to narratives. Sign languages share core features with spoken languages but also have modality-specific elements such as use of hands, face and spatial position to convey meaning and mark grammar. Here, we use naturalistic fMRI to examine which aspects of the language hierarchy are speech-specific versus modality-general. Native signers (n = 20) watched a 20-minute Polish Sign Language interpretation of The Fall of the House of Usher and its progressively scrambled versions during fMRI. We show that signed narratives synchronize hierarchical neural networks, revealing a modality-invariant dissociation between frontotemporal regions, which track sentence-level structure, and the Default Mode Network tracking plot. We identify two signatures not previously reported for speech: the superior parietal cortex synchronizes at long discourse timescales, while the ventral occipital cortex responds to word- and sentence-level processing. These results reveal both universal and potentially modality-specific aspects of language neurobiology.
articles.keywords: Hierarchy; Narrative; Sign (mathematics); Computer science; Linguistics; Sign language; Cognitive science; Natural language processing; Computational linguistics
articles.summary: 手语作为一种视觉语言，其叙述理解涉及神经时间层次结构，但通用性和模态特异性特征尚未明确。本研究使用fMRI技术，让20名母语手语者观看波兰手语叙事及其打乱版本，以考察语言层次的大脑活动。结果发现手语叙述同步了分层神经网络，额颞区跟踪句子结构，默认模式网络追踪情节，呈现模态不变的分离；同时识别出顶上皮层在长篇话语时间尺度同步、腹侧枕叶皮层响应词和句子处理的特异性签名。这些发现揭示了语言神经生物学的通用和潜在模态特异性方面。

articles.title: Genetic architecture of white matter microstructure captured by unsupervised deep representation learning of fractional anisotropy maps.
articles.authors: Xingzhong Zhao, Ziqian Xie, Wei He, Hyun Yong Koh, Bohong Guo, Han Chen, Myriam Fornage, Degui Zhi
articles.abstract: Fractional anisotropy (FA) from diffusion MRI is a widely used marker of white matter (WM) integrity, but conventional FA-based genetic studies typically rely on tract- or atlas-defined averages that may obscure spatially distributed WM variation and limit genetic discovery. Here, we propose a deep learning framework, termed unsupervised deep representation of WM (UDR-WM), which uses voxel-wise FA maps to derive brain-wide unsupervised deep imaging phenotypes (UDIP-FA) without prior anatomical assumptions. Compared with traditional FA phenotypes, UDIP-FA shows greater sensitivity to aging and substantially higher SNP-based heritability. Multivariate GWAS identified 939 lead SNPs across 586 loci, mapping to 3,480 UDIP-FA-associated genes. These genes are enriched in glial cells, especially astrocytes and oligodendrocytes, and form disease-relevant modules in protein interaction and co-expression networks implicating myelination and axonal structure. UDIP-FA is genetically associated with multiple brain disorders, cognitive traits, and polygenic risk. Together, our results suggest that UDIP-FA provides a biologically meaningful view of white matter, complementing conventional ROI-based FA measures and offering a more refined way to study its genetic architecture.
articles.keywords: Fractional anisotropy; Artificial intelligence; White matter; Representation (politics); Diffusion MRI; Deep learning; Pattern recognition (psychology); Computer science; Genetic architecture; Genome-wide association study
articles.summary: 本文针对传统基于分数各向异性的白质遗传研究可能受空间平均限制的问题，提出一种无监督深度学习框架，从体素级扩散MRI数据中提取全脑深部成像表型。该表型对衰老更敏感，具有更高的遗传力，并通过全基因组关联研究识别了与白质微结构相关的多个基因和遗传位点。主要发现包括这些基因在胶质细胞中富集，形成疾病相关模块，并与多种脑部疾病、认知特征及多基因风险存在遗传关联。

articles.title: Differential Responses to Group and Individual Emotional Voices: A Behavioral and ERP Study.
articles.authors: Shuqin Liu, Min Shao, Yudie Zhang, Lu Chen, Lu Yu, Rong Huang, Jiayi Shi, Jingyang Yu, Jing Meng
articles.abstract: Human beings live in social groups, and processing group emotions is crucial for interacting with and understanding others' behaviors and feelings. The present study investigated the cognitive and neural mechanisms of processing group versus individual emotional voices within the auditory modality. We examined ERP responses of 34 participants to group and individual voices across three emotional valences (negative, neutral, positive). Behavioral results revealed a significant interaction: group voices yielded shorter reaction times for neutral and positive emotions but longer for negative ones, alongside more positive overall emotional reactions. Electrophysiologically, group voices elicited more positive N1 and larger P2 amplitudes, with shorter latencies. More specifically, for negative and positive voices, group voices elicited larger P2 amplitudes than individual voices, while no significant difference between group and individual voices emerged for neutral voices. Furthermore, P2 amplitudes elicited by group voices were negatively correlated with participants' trait cognitive empathy. These results suggest that group voices elicit stronger early neural responses driven by an interplay of acoustic and social salience. Importantly, rather than demonstrating a direct empathy-specific neural mechanism, the observed negative correlation suggests that trait empathy may play a role in modulating the early sensory detection and attentional processing of complex, collective emotional signals.
articles.keywords: ERP; auditory; emotion; group
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了人类在听觉模态中处理群体与个体情绪声音的认知和神经机制，背景在于群体情绪对社会互动的重要性。实验对34名参与者进行了行为测量和ERP记录，使用了消极、中性和积极三种情绪效价的群体与个体声音刺激。行为结果显示，群体声音在消极情绪下反应时间更长，在积极情绪下反应时间更短，并诱发更积极的整体情绪反应。电生理发现，群体声音比个体声音诱发更正的N1和更大的P2振幅，且P2振幅与参与者的特质认知共情呈负相关，表明群体声音通过声学和社会显著性相互作用引发更强的早期神经反应。

articles.title: Human Brain Network for Reading the Mind from the Eyes: Beyond Activated and Deactivated Regions.
articles.authors: Maya Zheltyakova, Maxim Kireev, Artem Myznikov, Ruslan Masharipov, Mikhail Didur, Denis Cherednichenko, Alexander Korotkov
articles.abstract: BOLD signal changes in the Theory of Mind (ToM) network often reflect reduced deactivation during target conditions, yet these below-baseline effects remain largely unaddressed. Using fMRI data from an extended version of the Reading the Mind in the Eyes Test, we examined task-modulated functional connectivity (TMFC) of these areas. We revealed that, despite below-baseline BOLD responses during the reading the mind in the eyes (RME) task, TPJ-pSTS subregions in the left middle and superior temporal gyri, and angular gyrus (AG) demonstrated TMFC patterns closely resembling those of ToM network areas in the pSTS and inferior frontal gyrus (IFG) showing above-baseline activations. The RME task-associated network included regions supporting affective mentalizing (bilateral TPJ-pSTS, IFG, middle frontal gyri, precentral gyri, supplementary motor area) and face-processing areas. These areas also elicited reduced TMFC with ToM network subregions in the AG, supramarginal gyrus, precuneus, and medial prefrontal cortex, associated with cognitive mentalizing. These findings demonstrate that regions with greater BOLD responses during the RME task, despite these responses remaining below baseline, are functionally engaged. Together, the results indicate a dynamic interaction between ToM network subcomponents during the RME task, characterized by engagement of the affective subcomponent and its functional segregation from the cognitive subcomponent.
articles.keywords: BOLD signal; RMET; Reading the Mind in the Eyes Test; Theory of Mind; temporoparietal junction
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了Theory of Mind网络在“从眼睛读懂心理”测试中的功能连接机制。使用扩展版Reading the Mind in the Eyes Test的fMRI数据，分析了任务调节功能连接模式。研究发现，尽管某些区域的BOLD信号低于基线，但其功能连接与激活区域相似；任务相关网络涉及支持情感心理化的区域和面孔处理区域。这些区域与认知心理化子组件的功能连接减少，表明情感和认知子组件在任务中动态交互并功能分离。结果揭示了情绪感知中社会认知神经网络的复杂组织。

articles.title: Fear, anxiety, and the extended amygdala-Absence of evidence for strict functional segregation.
articles.authors: Paige R Didier, Shannon E Grogans, Claire M Kaplan, Hyung Cho Kim, Samiha Islam, Allegra S Anderson, Rachael M Tillman, Manuel Kuhn, Juyoen Hur, Andrew S Fox, Kathryn A DeYoung, Jason F Smith, Alexander J Shackman
articles.abstract: Since the time of Freud, the distinction between fear and anxiety has been a hallmark of influential models of emotion and emotional illness, including the Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders (DSM) and Research Domain Criteria (RDoC). Fear and anxiety disorders are common, debilitating, and challenging to treat, underscoring the importance of developing accurate models of the underlying neurobiology. Although there is consensus that the extended amygdala (EA) plays a central role in orchestrating responses to threat, the respective contributions of its two major subdivisions-the central nucleus of the amygdala (Ce) and bed nucleus of the stria terminalis (BST)-remain contentious. To help adjudicate this debate, we performed a harmonized mega-analysis of fMRI data acquired from 295 adults as they completed a well-established threat-anticipation paradigm. Contrary to popular double-dissociation models, results demonstrated that the Ce responds to temporally uncertain threat and the BST responds to certain threat. In direct comparisons, the two regions showed statistically indistinguishable responses, with strong Bayesian evidence of regional equivalence. In contrast, frontocortical regions responded preferentially to uncertain-threat anticipation. Together, these observations underscore the need to reformulate conceptual models that posit a strict segregation of temporally certain and uncertain threat processing in the EA.
articles.keywords: Research Domain Criteria (RDoC); affective neuroscience; bed nucleus of the stria terminalis (BST/BNST); extended amygdala (EA); fear and anxiety
articles.summary: 该研究探讨恐惧与焦虑在神经生物学模型中的区分，特别是扩展杏仁核在威胁反应中的作用。方法上，研究者对295名成人完成了威胁预期范式的fMRI数据进行协调大型分析。主要发现表明，中央杏仁核响应时间不确定的威胁，而终纹床核响应确定的威胁；两者在统计上表现相似，支持区域等效性，挑战了功能严格分离的传统模型。前额皮质区域则更偏好处理不确定威胁。这为重新构想情绪处理模型提供了证据。

articles.title: A Multimethod Assessment of Spontaneous Behavioral Synchrony in Race- and Age-Concordant Versus Discordant Dyads.
articles.authors: Morgan D Stosic, Adele E Weaver, Ken Fujiwara, Ishabel M Vicaria, Derek M Isaacowitz, Mollie A Ruben
articles.abstract: This work examines the impact of race and age concordance on behavioral synchrony and self-reported rapport in social interactions, employing a multimethod approach across three studies (Ntotal = 450) and a mini meta-analysis. Behavioral synchrony was assessed with reliable human coders and OpenPose, and rapport was measured through self-reports. Results indicated that race- and age-concordant dyads exhibited significantly greater behavioral synchrony than discordant dyads, suggesting that shared visible social identities may be associated with smoother, more connected interactions. Synchrony effects were stronger when measured by human coders compared to OpenPose, potentially reflecting human coders' biases related to perceived similarity between interactants or coders' more nuanced ability to detect certain components of synchrony compared to technological approaches. No significant effects of race or age concordance on self-reported rapport were observed. These findings highlight an important factor in predicting the spontaneous emergence of behavioral synchrony and emphasize the value of integrating multimethod approaches.
articles.keywords: age; behavioral synchrony; nonverbal behavior; race; rapport
articles.summary: 这项研究考察了种族和年龄一致性对行为同步性和自我报告融洽关系的影响。采用多方法，包括三个研究（总样本450人）和小型元分析，使用人类编码者和OpenPose技术评估行为同步性，融洽关系通过自我报告测量。结果发现，种族和年龄一致的对子比不一致的对子表现出显著更高的行为同步性，表明共享可见社会身份可能促进更顺畅的互动。人类编码者测量的同步性效应比OpenPose更强，可能反映了编码者对感知相似性的偏差或更细致的检测能力，而种族或年龄一致性对自我报告融洽关系没有显著影响。

articles.title: Histamine shapes the neurocomputational dynamics of human learning.
articles.authors: Michael J Colwell, Fin J E van Uum, Philip J Cowen, Marieke A G Martens, Michael Browning, Helen C Barron, Catherine J Harmer, Susannah E Murphy
articles.abstract: Histamine was the first canonical monoamine identified in the mammalian brain, yet arguably remains the least understood in its mechanistic contributions to human behaviour. Using a first-in-class causal probe (H3R inverse agonist pitolisant), we show how elevating histamine shapes offline and online temporal-hippocampal dynamics - sustaining episodic learning-related activity and polarising retrieval computations. Beyond this, histamine adaptively shifts neurocomputational strategy under high working memory load, while stabilising value updates during aversive reinforcement learning. These findings uncover a mechanistically grounded influence of this underexplored system on human neurocomputation, supporting its therapeutic potential in psychiatry.
articles.keywords: Histamine; Neuroscience; Monoamine neurotransmitter; Dynamics (music); Agonist; Psychology; Cognitive science; Reinforcement learning; Value (mathematics)
articles.summary: 组胺是哺乳动物大脑中首个被识别的单胺神经递质，但其对人类行为的机制贡献仍不明确。本研究使用H3R反向激动剂pitolisant作为因果探针，探索组胺如何影响人类学习的神经计算动力学。研究发现，提高组胺能维持情景学习相关的神经活动并极化检索计算；在高工作记忆负载下，组胺能适应性地改变神经计算策略；在厌恶强化学习中，组胺能稳定价值更新。这些结果揭示了组胺系统对人类神经计算的机制性影响，支持其在精神科治疗中的潜在应用。

articles.title: About time? The role of time perspective in the priority for positive over negative emotion in attention.
articles.authors: Briana L Kennedy, Mara Mather
articles.abstract: Compared to younger adults, older adults often prioritise processing positive information and deprioritize processing negative information. Known as the positivity effect, its mechanisms remain debated. One explanation of the positivity effect is that older adults are influenced by a sense of limited time left in life to focus more on emotional well-being compared with younger adults. Previous research shows that experimentally manipulating time perspective can mimic the positivity effect in younger adults, however, such findings have relied on designs where participants can reflect on emotional images they are viewing. In the current study, we examined if time perspective manipulations would similarly elicit positivity effect patterns in younger adults using an emotion-attention task with a rapid stimuli display. Across three experiments (N = 236, N = 431, and N = 259), we found that time perspective had little influence on attentional biases toward positive over negative emotional stimuli in younger adults. Additionally, when we incorporated a memory task into the design, effects of time perspective were not consistent with previous findings - in fact, patterns were in the opposite direction. We discuss these results as they relate to theories and the advantages and disadvantages of tasks used to examine the positivity effect.
articles.keywords: Positivity effect; aging; attention; emotion
articles.summary: 研究背景：老年人常表现出积极效应，即优先加工积极情绪信息，其机制可能与时间视角有关。先前研究在年轻人中操纵时间视角可模仿此效应，但依赖于反思性设计。本研究检验在快速刺激显示中，时间视角操纵是否在年轻人中引发类似注意力偏向模式。方法或样本：进行三个实验（样本量分别为236、431和259），使用情绪-注意力任务，以快速呈现情绪刺激，并在其中一个实验中加入记忆任务。主要发现：时间视角操纵对年轻人注意力偏向积极情绪刺激几乎没有影响；加入记忆任务时，效果与先前研究不一致，甚至相反。结果提示时间视角在情绪注意力加工中的作用有限，并对检验积极效应的任务方法提出了讨论。

articles.title: Early neural attunement to peer status predicts future social network position and popularity in adolescents.
articles.authors: Won-Gyo Shin, Kiho Sung, Junho Bang, Sunhae Sul, Yoosik Youm, Carolyn Parkinson
articles.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
articles.publish_info: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America, Vol. 123, Issue 22, 2026-06-02
articles.abstract: Popularity is a key marker of social status, yet the phenomena that support its emergence within newly forming social groups remain unclear. We combined functional neuroimaging and longitudinal school-wide social network analysis to track adolescents throughout their first year of high school, examining whether early neural responses to peers of varying social status predict later popularity. Here, we show that greater neural differentiation when viewing the faces of unpopular versus popular peers, particularly in the hippocampus, forecasts greater perceived popularity at the end of the school year. This relationship is mediated by midyear social network centrality, especially in-closeness centrality, which reflects being more easily reachable by peers. These findings suggest that early neural attunement to the status of their peers shapes how adolescents become embedded in their social networks, which in turn contributes to later gains in their own perceived popularity. More generally, these findings reveal how neural and social network-level processes jointly drive adolescents' navigation of evolving social landscapes and attainment of social status.
articles.keywords: hippocampus; neuroimaging; popularity; social network; social neuroscience
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了青少年早期神经反应如何影响其未来社交网络位置和人气。背景是人气作为社交地位的关键标志，但在新形成社交群体中支持其出现的现象尚不清楚。方法采用功能性神经影像学和纵向学校范围社交网络分析，追踪高中生在整个高一学年的变化。主要发现显示，在观看同伴面孔时，海马体等脑区的神经分化程度能预测学年末更高的感知人气，且这种关系通过年中社交网络中心性（特别是入度中心性）介导。这表明神经和社交网络过程共同驱动青少年的社交导航和地位获得。

articles.title: Neural representations of popularity and leadership status relate to conformity in daily life.
articles.authors: Ovidia A Stanoi, Danielle Cosme, Mia Jovanova, Yoona Kang, Faustine Corbani, Amanda L McGowan, José Carreras-Tartak, Anthony Resnick, Peter S Bearman, Zachary M Boyd, Dani S Bassett, David M Lydon-Staley, Peter J Mucha, Emily B Falk, Kevin N Ochsner
articles.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
articles.publish_info: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America, Vol. 123, Issue 22, 2026-06-02
articles.abstract: Individuals are motivated to increase their social status. To succeed in this pursuit, people must track information about others in their social sphere, monitor group norms, and adjust their behavior strategically. This study employed functional MRI and ecological momentary assessment methods in a sample of 92 college students belonging to 9 social groups to elucidate the neural mechanisms underlying these processes and their relationship to conformity in the context of alcohol use. When young adults passively looked at faces of their real-life social group peers, brain systems implicated in valuation and social cognition spontaneously tracked information about the popularity and leadership status of the social targets in an interdependent manner. Individual differences in these neural valuations were systematically associated with varying levels of conformity. Students who had stronger responses to faces of peers with relatively higher popularity and leadership status than themselves in one key valuation brain region, the ventromedial prefrontal cortex (vmPFC), were more likely to align their drinking behavior with their groups' norms in everyday life. These results provide evidence for how brain systems involved in valuation and social cognition flexibly track information about peers' popularity and leadership status in real-life social groups and contribute to a growing literature on the neural mechanisms through which social comparison processes shape conformity. Our study highlights the vmPFC as a central hub that spontaneously tracks status differences between the self and peers and uses this information to guide behavior to match group norms.
articles.keywords: conformity; fMRI; social cognition; social groups; social status
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了社会地位信息处理的神经机制及其与日常顺从行为的关系。采用功能磁共振成像和生态瞬时评估方法，以92名大学生为样本，涵盖9个社会群体。结果显示，当受试者被动观看真实社会同龄人的面孔时，大脑的评价和社会认知系统自发追踪对方的受欢迎程度和领导地位信息。这些神经反应的个体差异与顺从行为水平系统相关，其中腹内侧前额叶皮层对更高地位同龄人的较强反应预测了日常饮酒行为对群体规范的顺从程度。研究为理解社会比较过程如何通过神经机制塑造顺从行为提供了实证证据。

articles.title: Affective intensity of enacted stigma events and emotion regulation strategy use among sexual and gender minorities.
articles.authors: Christina Dyar
articles.abstract: The emotion regulation choice framework (Sheppes, 2020) proposes that the affective intensity of a stressor (i.e., how distressing a stressor is) influences the selection of emotion regulation strategies. The present study aimed to test this hypothesis in the context of enacted stigma to determine whether more distressing enacted stigma experiences differentially predict the use of different emotion regulation strategies. We also aimed to determine if enacted stigma experiences that are more distressing have larger and longer term effects on affect and to examine daily factors that may increase the affective intensity of an enacted stigma event. We used data from an ecological momentary assessment study of enacted stigma from a sample of 109 older adult sexual and gender minorities, a group that is largely underrepresented in research on enacted stigma. More distressing enacted stigma events were associated with more pronounced rumination and coping self-efficacy above and beyond the effect of simply experiencing any enacted stigma. More distressing enacted stigma events also had stronger and longer lasting associations with negative affect than less distressing events. Higher stressor burden and lower coping self-efficacy also prospectively predicted higher affective intensity for subsequent enacted stigma events. The present study demonstrated partial support for the emotion regulation choice framework in the context of enacted stigma. This highlights the role of elevated stressor burden and coping self-efficacy in influencing emotional reactions to enacted stigma events and regulation of emotions following these experiences. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
articles.keywords: Distressing; Psychology; Stressor; Coping (psychology); Rumination; Affect (linguistics); Clinical psychology; Stigma (botany); Context (archaeology); Experience sampling method
articles.summary: 本研究旨在测试情绪调节选择框架在实施污名事件中的适用性，探究情感强度如何影响情绪调节策略的使用。采用生态瞬时评估方法，对109名老年性少数和性别少数群体进行研究。发现更痛苦的实施污名事件与更明显的反刍和应对自我效能相关，且对负面情感的影响更强、更持久。此外，高压力负担和低应对自我效能会前瞻性预测后续事件的情感强度，表明情绪调节选择框架在实施污名情境中部分成立。

articles.title: Scaffolding the Social Mind: Emotion Recognition Supports Mentalizing but Reinforces Bias
articles.authors: C Biasiotti, D Ruzzante, F Meconi, J Vaes
articles.abstract: Abstract Mentalizing—inferring others' mental states—is a core social function supported by both perceptual and contextual processes. Emotion recognition similarly unfolds in two stages: early perceptual decoding of facial features followed by context-sensitive interpretation. Here, we tested whether emotion recognition scaffolds mentalizing across these stages and whether they attenuate or amplify social bias. Participants (N = 34) completed a face categorization task during EEG recording, in which mentalizing was operationalized as differential neural responses to mindful (human) versus mindless (doll-like) faces, while perceptual (neutral vs. smiling) and contextual (ingroup vs. outgroup) cues were systematically manipulated. Early neural responses differentiated human from doll-like faces, indicating rapid mind detection despite perceptual similarity. Smiling expressions enhanced early neural sensitivity across both human and doll-like faces, suggesting that emotional information is extracted at early perceptual stages independently of stimulus humanity. Later EEG components revealed an asymmetry: emotional expressions selectively boosted mental state attribution for ingroup faces, reflecting the integration of contextual social information at later stages. Implicit association tests confirmed this pattern, with mind-related concepts more strongly associated with smiling ingroup faces.
articles.category: Emotion, Emotion Perception, Face, Social Cognition
articles.summary: 本研究探讨情绪识别是否支持心理理论并影响社会偏见。通过EEG记录34名参与者进行面孔分类任务，操纵表情（中性或微笑）和群体内外线索。发现早期神经活动快速区分人类与非人类面孔，微笑表情增强早期感知敏感性；晚期活动显示情绪表达对内群体面孔的心理状态归因有选择性增强，从而强化社会偏见。隐式联想测试进一步证实了这一模式。

articles.title: Unpacking mentalising through its denial: Integrating the roles of perceptual and contextual cues
articles.authors: Jeroen Vaes, Daniela Ruzzante, Carolina Biasiotti
articles.keywords: Unpacking; Perception; Psychology; Cognitive psychology; Social psychology; Communication; Social perception; Categorical perception; Visual perception
articles.summary: 摘要缺失，无法生成自动总结。

articles.title: Power in fantasy stories and life story episodes: an exploratory study on meaning in life in elderlies from Cameroon, the Czech Republic, Germany, and Hong Kong
articles.authors: Jan Hofer, Alma Au, Iva Poláčková Šolcová, Peter Tavel, Teresa Tsien
articles.abstract: Abstract Living in accordance with the true self, that is reflected by significant components of personality (e.g., basic motives), relates to psychological well-being and mental health. While findings for the motives of affiliation/relatedness and achievement/competence are relatively straightforward, theoretical approaches make different assumptions on consequences of striving for power, defined as a concern for having impact on others' behaviors and emotions (Winter, 1973). Self-determination theory argues that pursuing power-related strivings deflects from satisfying basic psychological needs. In contrast, the power motive represents an integral part of the motivational system in (implicit) motive disposition theory and its satisfaction predicts well-being. In the present study, we conducted an exploratory analysis to examine whether a high need for power is associated with power-motivational content in life story episodes. Moreover, we examined whether participants report higher levels of meaning in life when power-motivational content in life story episodes matches the strength of their implicit power motive. To scrutinize the generalizability of assumed relationships, data were assessed among older adults ( n = 450) in Cameroon, China (Hong Kong), Czech Republic, and Germany. In sum, analyses provided weak support for the association between nPower and power-motivational content in life story episodes. However, our findings suggest that, regardless of cultural background, power-motivated individuals report higher levels of meaning in life the more their recalled life episodes reflect power-related themes. Yet, it is crucial to confirm our initial findings in future hypothesis-testing studies, particularly with regard to factors that enable individuals to have motive-relevant experiences in life and to recall them. Effects of implicit motives on the relationship between life review and psychological well-being are discussed.
articles.keywords: Psychology; Meaning (existential); Generalizability theory; Exploratory research; Power (physics); Social psychology; Personality; Fantasy; Content (measure theory); Life satisfaction
articles.summary: 本研究探讨权力动机在生活故事中的体现如何与意义感相关，特别是在不同文化背景下。对来自喀麦隆、香港、捷克和德国的450名老年人进行探索性分析，测量隐性权力动机和生活故事中的权力主题。分析显示权力动机与生活故事中的权力主题关联较弱，但无论文化背景，权力动机强的个体在回忆的生活故事反映权力主题时报告更高的意义感。研究为动机与幸福感的关系提供了初步跨文化证据。

articles.title: Beauty is in the brain of the beholder: Psychological and physiological effects of expertise on the perception of classicist and modernist buildings.
articles.authors: Anita D'Anselmo, Lorenzo Pellegrini, Giulia Prete, Panagiotis Mavros, Gianluca Malatesta, Caterina Palestini, Alberto Di Domenico, Nicola Mammarella, Luca Tommasi, Laura Bonanni
articles.journal: Psychology of Aesthetics, Creativity, and the Arts
articles.publish_info: Psychology of Aesthetics, Creativity, and the Arts, 2026-06-01
articles.keywords: Beauty; Perception; Psychology; Aesthetics; Cognitive psychology; Cognitive science; Creativity; Social psychology; Aesthetic experience
articles.summary: 摘要缺失，无法生成自动总结。

articles.title: Solidarity With Friends, Relationship Status, and Mental Health During the COVID-19 Pandemic
articles.authors: Woosang Hwang, Merril Silverstein
articles.journal: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships
articles.publish_info: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships, 2026-06-05
articles.abstract: While the solidarity paradigm has been extensively applied to intergenerational relationships, its relevance to adult friendships remains largely unexplored. Therefore, we aimed to uncover distinct types of solidarity with friends among adults and examine whether these types are associated with mental health (depressive symptoms, psychological well-being, and self-esteem) during the COVID-19 pandemic. Furthermore, we examined the moderating role of relationship status (partnered vs. unpartnered) on the above associations. We analyzed 1,353 adults (age range: 17-91) from the Longitudinal Study of Generations (2022) Wave. Latent class analysis with three-step approach was conducted. Four latent classes of solidarity with friends were identified: (1) Tight-knit with many friends , (2) Social with many friends , (3) Functional with few friends , and (4) Detached with few friends . Furthermore, individuals who were identified in the Tight-knit with many friends and Social with many friends latent classes reported better mental health than those in the Detached with few friends latent class. Regarding the moderation effects, we found that unpartnered individuals in the Detached with few friends latent class reported poorer mental health than partnered counterparts, compared to those in Tight-knit with many friends and Social with many friends latent classes. Our findings indicate that solidarity with friends plays a crucial role in promoting mental health in adulthood, especially for those who are unpartnered. By extending the solidarity paradigm to the realm of adult friendships, this study lays a foundation for further inquiry into social networks within family science.
articles.summary: 本研究旨在探讨成人友谊中的团结类型及其与心理健康的关系，并考察关系状态的调节作用，以扩展团结范式在家庭科学中的应用。基于纵向研究数据，对1,353名成人进行潜类分析，识别出四种友谊团结类型。结果发现，紧密型和社交型友谊与更好的心理健康（如抑郁症状、心理幸福感和自尊）相关，而疏离型友谊则与较差的心理健康相关，尤其对无伴侣个体影响更显著。研究表明，与朋友的团结在成人期对心理健康至关重要，特别是对缺乏伴侣的个体。

articles.title: Preferences and Polyamory: Investigating Ideal Mate Preferences for Concurrent Partners in Monogamous and Polyamorous Individuals
articles.authors: Ashley J. Coventry, Benjamin Gelbart, Kathryn V. Walter, Tamsin German, Daniel Conroy-Beam
articles.journal: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships
articles.publish_info: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships, 2026-06-04
articles.abstract: Although a large body of research has been devoted to investigating human mate preferences, much of this research focuses exclusively on monogamous relationships. While monogamy is a prevalent mating system, concurrent, non-monogamous mating has also been common both throughout human history and across the ethnographic record. Here, we seek to address this gap in the literature by exploring ideal preferences for two concurrent romantic partners among both monogamous and polyamorous participants. In Studies 1 and 2, using a budget allocation paradigm, we performed a k -Means cluster analysis to explore the types of ideal concurrent partners preferred by two largely monogamous samples of participants. In Study 3, we applied these same methods among a sample of polyamorous participants. Across all studies, the results revealed that a plurality of participants preferred two well-rounded partners, in which all traits were valued similarly. However, monogamous men were significantly more likely than monogamous women to prefer at least one partner for whom attractiveness and skill in bed were prioritized above all other traits. These findings only partially generalized to polyamorous participants, who also most often preferred two well-rounded partners, but did not exhibit gender differences in cluster assignment. In addition, we found that, across studies, partner preferences are likely influenced by intended investment between partners, suggesting that preferences are sensitive to the specific contexts and structures of these relationships. These findings emphasize the need for more research on the psychological systems involved in non-monogamous mating.
articles.summary: 本研究旨在填补伴侣偏好研究中对一夫一妻制的过度关注，探索一夫一妻制和多边恋个体对同时存在的两个伴侣的理想偏好。使用预算分配范式和k-means聚类分析，分别调查了一夫一妻制样本（研究1和2）和多边恋样本（研究3）。研究发现，大多数参与者偏好特质均衡的伴侣，但一夫一妻制男性比女性更可能优先考虑吸引力和性技巧。多边恋参与者也最常偏好均衡伴侣，但未表现出性别差异；此外，伴侣偏好受预期关系投资影响，表明偏好对关系结构敏感。

articles.title: Linking Parents' Appropriated Racial Oppression to Their Racial-Ethnic Socialization Practices: An Intergenerational Examination Among Black Parent-Child Dyads
articles.authors: Shardé McNeil Smith, Anisa Codamon, Chelsea S. Alexander, Jaden Anderson, Shawn C. T. Jones
articles.journal: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships
articles.publish_info: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships, 2026-06-02
articles.abstract: Black Americans face not only systemic racism but also the internalization of white supremacist ideologies, a process known as appropriated racial oppression (ARO). ARO involves adopting harmful racial stereotypes that can shape self-concept and behavior. Although its impact on individual well-being is documented, less is known about how ARO influences parenting, particularly racial-ethnic socialization (RES). Therefore, this study explores how parents' ARO relates to the racial-ethnic socialization messages that their children report receiving, offering additional insight into intergenerational patterns of racial stress. Drawing on the Sociocultural Family Stress Model, we analyzed data from 201 Black parent-adolescent dyads (adolescents: M age = 14.92 years; parents: M age = 43.01 years). We examined six RES dimensions: racial pride, racial barriers, self-worth, egalitarian, negative messages, and socialization behaviors. Higher levels of ARO were associated with fewer positive and more negative RES messages. Skin tone, but not gender, moderated these associations such that the negative effects of ARO on racial barrier, self-worth, and egalitarian messages were stronger among lighter-skinned parents and youth. These findings highlight ARO as a potential barrier to affirming racial socialization practices and underscore the need for culturally grounded interventions that address internalized oppression in Black families.
articles.keywords: Socialization; Oppression; Racism; Psychology; Social psychology; Psychological intervention; White (mutation); Sociocultural evolution; Race (biology)
articles.summary: 本研究探讨了黑人父母的内化种族压抑（ARO）如何影响他们对子女进行的种族民族社会化（RES）实践。基于社会文化家庭压力模型，研究分析了201对黑人亲子对（青少年平均年龄14.92岁，父母平均年龄43.01岁）的数据。结果显示，ARO水平越高，父母传递的积极RES信息越少，消极信息越多。肤色调节了这种关联，在肤色较浅的父母和青少年中，ARO对种族障碍、自我价值和平均主义信息的负面影响更强。这些发现突出了ARO作为肯定性种族社会化实践障碍的作用，强调需要文化干预来解决黑人家庭中的内化压抑问题。

articles.title: Couples' Coparenting and Parent-Child Relationship Quality: A Dyadic Daily Diary Study
articles.authors: Naomi Downes, Giulia Spagnulo, Laura M. Vowels, Joëlle Darwiche
articles.journal: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships
articles.publish_info: Journal of Social and Personal Relationships, 2026-06-01
articles.abstract: This study examined how daily experiences of coparenting relate to parent-child relationship quality using a dyadic daily diary design. Eighty-five heterosexual cohabiting couples (N = 170 individuals), with at least one child under 16, completed daily assessments over seven consecutive days. Participants reported on coparenting cooperation, conflict, and child involvement in conversations, as well as parent-child relationship quality. Actor-Partner Interdependence Models (APIMs) distinguished between stable between-person differences and within-person daily fluctuations. At the between-person level, coparenting cooperation was positively associated with both parents' own parent-child relationship quality, and child involvement in conversations was positively associated with the partner's. At the within-person level, daily coparenting conflict predicted lower same-day parent-child relationship quality for mothers, while other same-day and next-day effects were non-significant. These findings highlight the dynamic nature of coparenting effects across temporal levels, emphasizing the distinction between stable relational climate and short-term spillover processes. Practically, interventions may benefit from strengthening long-term cooperative coparenting while helping parents prevent daily conflict from spilling over into parent-child interactions.
articles.keywords: Coparenting; Psychology; Developmental psychology; Psychological intervention; Quality (philosophy); Child custody; Spillover effect; Interpersonal relationship
articles.summary: 本研究采用配对日常日记设计，考察夫妻共同养育的日常经历与亲子关系质量之间的关系。样本包括85对异性恋同居夫妇（共170人），他们连续七天报告共同养育的合作、冲突、孩子参与对话情况以及亲子关系质量。研究发现，在个体间水平上，共同养育合作与父母自身的亲子关系质量正相关，孩子参与对话与伴侣的亲子关系质量正相关；在个体内水平上，日常共同养育冲突预测母亲当天的亲子关系质量下降，但其他当日和次日效应不显著。结果强调了共同养育在跨时间层面上的动态影响，区分了稳定关系氛围与短期溢出过程。
